violations.description: POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Reduced oxygen packaged fish noted being thawed not following proper procedures.

PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent by Ac unit in back room noted in need of cleaning.
